_provenance: reconstructed-from-trace-run-1.zip per RCA-FINDINGS.md §'State JSON Reconstruction Note'. The instrumented RCA spec at post-fix/rca-traces/registration-rca.spec.ts was not directly executable via Playwright's project-aware config (testDir/testMatch filters scope the candidate-app-mutation project to tests/specs/candidate only), so the empirical evidence comes from the candidate-profile.spec.ts run that has the SAME live-tree H1/H2 instrumentation. See RCA-FINDINGS.md §'Plan 01 Task 2 Deviation' for full rationale.

http_status_chain.Set-Cookie_observed: sb-127-auth-token (initial session cookie set by verifyOtp via @supabase/ssr cookies.setAll())

cookies.name: sb-127-auth-token
cookies._note: Valid sb-127-auth-token cookie set IMMEDIATELY by the auth/callback verifyOtp response. This DISPROVES the framing that 'login never happened' — the user has a valid authenticated session at this checkpoint.

localStorage: (not captured directly in trace; trace.zip records server-set cookies. Browser-side storage state would require captureState helper run inside the spec — see provenance note.)
_hydration_signal: window.__phase79RcaHydrated NOT YET set (it is set by (protected)/+layout.svelte's $effect block, which only fires when the user reaches a /candidate/(protected)/ route. At this checkpoint we are mid-redirect at /en/candidate/register/password, which is NOT under (protected)).
bodyHtml_summary: Mid-redirect from /en/candidate/auth/callback to /en/candidate/register/password (HTTP 303). The register/password page renders the PasswordSetter form.
